hero.title: Express Delivery
hero.subtitle: Fast, Reliable, and On-Time Shipping
hero.description: Get your packages delivered quickly with our next-day and two-day express shipping options. Perfect for urgent deliveries, both domestic and international.

overview.title: Why Choose Express Delivery?
overview.description: Our Express Delivery service ensures your shipments arrive on time, every time. With priority handling, real-time tracking, and dedicated support, you can trust us for your most urgent deliveries.

features.title: Next-Day & Two-Day Delivery
features.description: Choose from flexible express options for both domestic and international shipments.

features.title: Real-Time Tracking
features.description: Track your package at every step with instant notifications and live updates.

features.title: Priority Handling
features.description: Your express shipments receive top priority and secure handling throughout the journey.

features.title: Door-to-Door Service
features.description: We pick up and deliver directly to your door for maximum convenience.

cta.title: Ready to Ship Express?
cta.description: Get a quote now and experience the speed and reliability of our Express Delivery service.
